label: Check cable seating
cmd: Reseat cable at both ends — pull fully out, inspect, push back in

label: Inspect for damage
cmd: Look for bent pins, dust, kinks, or damaged fiber ends

label: Verify port LEDs
cmd: Check link LED on both switch ports — should be green/amber, not off

label: Label check
cmd: Confirm cable label matches cutsheet for both ends

label: Escalate if no fix
cmd: If reseat doesn't fix it, comment on the Google Sheet and tag network
